message:
data: add EBR memory usage benchmark artifacts

Add benchmark results for epoch-based reclamation memory usage tracking
in both the top-level artifacts/ and crates/ffs-mvcc/artifacts/ dirs.
These JSON snapshots capture memory pressure under EBR GC workloads
for baseline comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
